sections.heading: S alary
sections.text:
2. S alary
SCHEDULE
CHAPTER 263
CONSTITUTIONAL OFFICES (EMOLUMENTS) Act
41 of 1993
20 of 1995
An Act to provide for revised salaries for holders of offices to which Article 105 of 34 of 1995
the Constitution applies; to repeal the Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) 25 of 1996
Act, 1992; and to provide for matters connected with or incidental to the
foregoing.
[24th December, 1993

sections.heading: (1) This Act may be cited as the Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) Act. Short title and
sections.text:
1. (1) This Act may be cited as the Constitutional Offices (Emoluments) Act. Short title and
commencement
Copyright Ministry of Legal Affairs, Government of the Republic of Zambia
The Laws of Zambia
(2) Section two shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st April, 1993.
(3) Section three shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1st
September, 1993.

sections.heading: The holder of an office specified in the first column of the Schedule shall be paid Salary
sections.text:
2. The holder of an office specified in the first column of the Schedule shall be paid Salary
a salary at the annual rate prescribed for that office in the second column of the Schedule.
(As amended by Act No. 20 of 1995 and Act No. 25 of 1996)
